name: Coconut-Pineapple Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:40
1. Combine softened margarine and sugar in a small bowl. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until the mixture is light and fluffy. Gradually beat in flour to form a soft dough.
2. Press the dough evenly onto the bottom and up the sides of a 9 x 9 x 1-3/4 inch ungreased pan. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for 15 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool.
3. Drain pineapple very thoroughly. Spread the drained pineapple over the crust.
4. Add the rest of sugar to egg; beat until just blended. Add melted margarine, vanilla, and coconut. Spread the mixture over the pineapple. Bake for an additional 20 minutes or until the top is golden brown. Cool, then cut into 1-1/2 inch squares.
Yield: about 3 dozen.
